description: This Java class 'NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor' is a Spring Boot environment post-processor that sets the 'spring.datasource.url' property based on Neon-style environment variables, converting URI formats to JDBC URLs for PostgreSQL databases. It ensures proper configuration for database connections during application startup.

classes.name: NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor
classes.description: A Spring Boot environment post-processor that configures the datasource URL from Neon-style environment variables, converting URI formats to JDBC URLs for PostgreSQL.

methods.name: postProcessEnvironment
methods.description: Main method that sets 'spring.datasource.url' based on environment variables if not already set.

methods.name: getOrder
methods.description: Returns the order in which this post-processor runs, set to highest precedence.

methods.name: firstNonBlank
methods.description: Utility method to return the first non-blank string from given inputs.

methods.name: normalizeToJdbcPostgres
methods.description: Converts a PostgreSQL URI or returns the JDBC URL if already in JDBC format.

methods.name: urlEncode
methods.description: Encodes strings for URL query parameters.
